item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Keseimbangan antara dua hal ini sangat kompleks dan harus dibuat dengan hati-hati.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society and public interest should be prioritized, but by turns 3 and 5 frames the issue as careful balance between collective welfare and individual rights. Agent B consistently rejects society-first priority and keeps individual freedom as the main legal principle, while acknowledging that social justice matters.
